title: Israel accused of using white phosphorus in Lebanon: Why the weapon is controversial
summary_full: Human Rights Watch alleges Israel unlawfully used white phosphorus shells in a Lebanese village, sparking concerns over civilian harm. The controversial incendiary munition ignites on contact with oxygen, causing severe burns and fires. Meanwhile, Hezbollah reports engaging Israeli helicopter-borne forces in eastern Lebanon, escalating regional tensions amid ongoing Israeli strikes across the country.
